About Istvan

A visionary building
the new world

I am a simple guy with a truth of living in a better world day by day. The recipe is staggeringly simple — outer world follows inner world, not the other way around.

Through mantras I set my game: I am healthy, I am wealthy, I am capable, I am in joy. I have it all — I Am. I accept full unconditional self-responsibility for my life.

My passion is what I call space jumping — building meaningful things, then sitting at a tropical beach with friends watching the sunset. Life is amazing. 🤙

Regenerative Economy Space Jumping Food Systems Consciousness Silva Method Community Longevity Sustainability

What I'm
Building

01
Lana Loves Exeter

A complete regenerative economy ecosystem — local currency, marketplace, wallets, payments, community tools and governance. An Exeter pilot designed to be replicated worldwide.

Lana Growers

Replicable local food models helping growers earn more while communities circulate real value. Sustainable trade with structured circulation.

Silva Method

Practitioner of the Silva Method — designing life from the inside out through mind, consciousness and intention.

What I believe

01
Inner Creates Outer

Change starts within and ripples outward into communities and economies. The world is a mirror.

02
Regenerative by Design

Every system should give back more than it takes — economies, food systems, and communities alike.

03
Replicable Models

What works in Exeter can work anywhere. Building frameworks any community can adopt and adapt.

04
Unconditional Love

Joy, beauty and love are the foundation — not the reward. I accept full self-responsibility for my life.
